title: tithonia pittieri
intro: Tithonia pittieri, also known as Mexican sunflower, is a flowering plant native to Central America, characterized by its bright orange flowers and tall stature. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating gastrointestinal issues. Tithonia pittieri can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and topical applications, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
